Document:
# Bartending
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Bartending"/]
## Bartending, Drinks, and Other Liquids
Below is a list of all drink reagents and reactions available in Nuclear 14. They are roughly sorted by base reagents, then reactions and products, classified by their primary component.
Milk from domesticated wasteland animals. A rare and valuable source of nutrition.
[bold]Brahmin Milk[/bold]
[bold]Bighorner Milk[/bold]
[bold]Radstag Milk[/bold]
Water is the most essential liquid in the Wasteland. Always purify water before drinking - dirty and irradiated water can make you sick.
[bold]Liquid[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Filtered Water[/bold] Safe to drink. Purified by filter, chemistry, or boiling. [bold]Dirty Water[/bold] Carries illness risk. Purify before drinking. [bold]Irradiated Water[/bold] Causes radiation exposure. Purify before drinking. [bold]Salt Water[/bold] Used in some crafting recipes. Not safe to drink directly.
Plant extracts obtained by grinding or pressing plant products. Used in cooking, crafting, and as drink ingredients. See [textlink="Botany" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Botany"/] for plant sources and [textlink="Materials" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Materials"/] for base ingredient farming.
Teas brewed from Wasteland plants. Many have mild medicinal or nutritional properties.
[bold]Agave Tea[/bold]
[bold]Blackberry Tea[/bold]
[bold]Barrel Cactus Tea[/bold]
[bold]Broc Tea[/bold]
[bold]Datura Tea[/bold]
[bold]Honey Mesquite Tea[/bold]
[bold]Mutfruit Tea[/bold]
[bold]Nettle Tea[/bold]
[bold]Prickly Pear Tea[/bold]
[bold]Starlightberry Tea[/bold]
[bold]Tarberry Tea[/bold]
[bold]White Horsenettle Tea[/bold]
[bold]Xander Tea[/bold]
[bold]Fire Ant Nectar Tea[/bold]
Nuka-Cola and other pre-war carbonated beverages. Highly sought after throughout the Wasteland.
[bold]Drink[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Nuka-Cola[/bold] Standard pre-war cola. Widely scavenged. [bold]Nuka-Cola Quantum[/bold] Glowing blue variant. Rare and highly valued. [bold]Nuka-Cola Quartz[/bold] White-label variant. Clear with a distinct taste. [bold]Nuka-Cola Clear[/bold] Colorless formula. Uncommon find. [bold]Nuka-Cola Cherry[/bold] Red cherry variant. [bold]Nuka-Cola Grape[/bold] Purple grape variant. [bold]Nuka-Cola Wild[/bold] Fruit-flavored wild variant. [bold]Nuka-Cola Orange[/bold] Orange citrus variant. [bold]Nuka-Cola Victory[/bold] Victory edition. Pre-war promotional variant. [bold]Nuka-Cola Yellow[/bold] Yellow formula. Citrus based. [bold]Irradiated Nuka-Cola[/bold] Contaminated - causes minor radiation. Avoid if possible. [bold]Vim![/bold] RobCo energy drink alternative. Found in northeast Wasteland caches. [bold]Vim! Captain's Blend[/bold] Specialty Vim variant with added kick.
Alcoholic beverages brewed and distilled throughout the Wasteland. See the in-game bartending menu for the complete reagent group listing.
